3332450.name: Wykke
3332450.description:
This game is still in early development. Please wishlist and follow the page for updates as the game progresses!

Wykke is a dark fantasy game about a witch exploring the depths of her powers against angelic beings in the void between worlds. The combat style moves at a deliberate and tactical pace akin to soulslike games, but has a roguelite progression with arena style wave combat, artifacts to level up each weapon, and permanent upgrades after each defeat. Master the use of various wands, each with a unique combat style, and become the most powerful occultists of all time.
